About Me

Who I Am

I'm Noura Al-Obaidi, a graphic designer focused on delivering clear, organized visual solutions that communicate ideas simply and effectively.

I work across brand identity, packaging, print, and digital design — with deep attention to detail and a strong commitment to quality of execution.

I hold a Bachelor's degree in Social Work from Princess Nourah Bint Abdulrahman University.
